themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "But his inwards and his legs shall he wash in water: and the priest shall burn all on the alt...". Word-study detail reinforces "אִשֵּׁ֥ה: an offering made by fire - properly, a burnt-offering; but occasionally of any sacr...".
